title: Crispy Almond Crusted Wontons
description: A crispy and crunchy twist on traditional wontons. Perfect as a snack or appetizer. Inspired by Chinese cuisine.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a small bowl, whisk together egg and water.
Dip a wonton wrapper into the egg mixture, coating both sides.
Place a small amount of almond crumble mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press edges together to seal.
Repeat with remaining wrappers and filling.
Fry wontons in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels and serve warm.
In a small saucepan, heat honey and sesame seeds over low heat until bubbly.
Drizzle honey sauce over wontons and serve.
